name: mojo-conv2d-batched-backward-tests
description: Pattern for verifying Conv2D backward-pass gradient accumulation over the batch dimension in Mojo. Use when: (1) existing backward tests only cover batch=1 and you need batch>1 coverage, (2) verifying grad_bias = batch * out_H * out_W, (3) verifying grad_weights accumulates over multiple batch items, (4) extending multichannel conv2d backward tests to batched inputs.
